name: 醫院病房
description: 男主發燒住院、女主深夜趕來照顧，密閉空間＋照護行為天然製造親密感。護士的「你們是情侶」誤會推動兩人面對真實情感。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Ryan, you have a fever. / You have no household medicines. I'm heading out to buy a thermometer and a fever reducer. / He's handsome while you're tender. What a perfect match. / Dr. Wonder, that girl is his girlfriend. Last night, she said almost the same thing to me.
examples.context: 男主發燒住院、女主深夜趕來照顧，密閉空間＋照護行為天然製造親密感。護士的「你們是情侶」誤會推動兩人面對真實情感。
